characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion, blonde hair tied back. She wears glasses.
characters.demeanor: Focused on her task, slightly confused by her mistakes but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young female avatar, fair complexion, red hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: What are you doing? [What are you doing?]
Character A says: I am cooking my daughter. [I am cooking my daughter.]
Character B says: What? You are cooking your daughter!? [What? You are cooking your daughter!?]
Character A says: अरे नहीं, मेरा मतलब है I am making food for my daughter! [Oh no, I mean I am making food for my daughter!]
Character B says: Oh thank God. तो कहिए: I am cooking for my daughter. [Oh thank God. Then say: I am cooking for my daughter.]
Character A says: I am cooking for my daughter. [I am cooking for my daughter.]
Character B says: How old is your daughter? [How old is your daughter?]
Character A says: She has 3. [She has 3.]
Character B says: उम्र बताने के लिए 'is' लगाते हैं। Say: She is three years old. [To tell age we use 'is'. Say: She is three years old.]
Character A says: She is three years old. [She is three years old.]
Character A says: I have many work today. [I have many work today.]
Character B says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"? [Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?]
Character A says: I have a lot of work today. [I have a lot of work today.]
Character A says: मैं अपनी English कैसे improve करूँ? [How can I improve my English?]
Character B says: Supernova पर मेरे साथ रोज़ practice करके! मैं आपका AI tutor हूँ। काम करते-करते भी आप English बोलना सीख सकते हैं। रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट! [By practicing with me every day on Supernova! I am your AI tutor. You can learn to speak English even while working. Just 15 minutes daily!]
Character A says: Perfect, रोज़ practice करूँगी! [Perfect, I will practice daily!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable and funny English translation mistake.
- Demonstrates the core product value: real-time, gentle correction by an AI tutor in a practical, everyday setting.
- Establishes Supernova as a convenient, low-pressure way to learn English (just 15 minutes daily while multitasking).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
What are you doing?
I am cooking my daughter.
What?
You are cooking your daughter!?
अरे नहीं, मेरा मतलब है
I am making food
for my daughter!
तो कहिए:
I am cooking for my daughter.
How old is your daughter?
She has 3.
Say:
She is three years old.
I have many work today.
Do you mean:
"I have a lot of work today"?
मैं अपनी English कैसे improve करूँ?
Supernova पर मेरे साथ रोज़ practice करके!
मैं आपका AI tutor हूँ।
काम करते-करते भी आप English बोलना सीख सकते हैं।
रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट!
Perfect, रोज़ practice करूँगी!

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
- Reinforces brand identity with the logo and app store badges.
